en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Guatemalan Occupational Health and Safety documentation in the Guatemala Occupational Health and Safety Plan Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Avetta PQF - Guatemala Occupational Health and Safety Plan Certificate
Please upload your company’s valid Occupational Health and Safety Plan Certificate to confirm compliance with Guatemala’s Occupational Health and Safety Plan requirements.
The Occupational Health and Safety Plan Certificate is typically valid for three years from the issue date unless workplace conditions change significantly.
Please provide the expiration date of your Occupational Health and Safety Plan Certificate.
